data.title: Encryption Everywhere
data.description: End-to-end data encryption across services and communications.
data.technical_spec: Transport Layer Security (TLS), Perfect Forward Secrecy (PFS).

data.title: Two-Factor Authentication
data.description: Multi-tier authentication to secure user accounts from unauthorized access.
data.technical_spec: Physical security keys, SMS verification codes.

data.title: AI-Driven Threat Detection
data.description: Use of artificial intelligence to identify and respond to potential threats in real time.
data.technical_spec: Machine learning models, anomaly detection algorithms.

data.title: Bug Bounty Program
data.description: Encourages third-party researchers to find vulnerabilities with rewards.
data.technical_spec: Publicly listed bug bounty initiatives, tiered reward systems.

data.title: Secure Boot Process
data.description: Firmware authentication and verification at boot time to prevent unauthorized code execution.
data.technical_spec: Trusted Platform Module (TPM), secure boot chain.
